response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals with proven leadership, architecture expertise, and test-driven development practices across 16+ professional years. However, he lacks recent C++ experience (last professional C++ engagement was 2014-2015) and has no background in industrial automation, IoT, or IEC 62443 standards—all core requirements for this role. His rapid technology adoption ability is a mitigating factor, but C++ competency verification would be essential before proceeding.
strengths: Strong software architecture and design patterns expertise with proven experience building scalable microservices and event-driven systems at scale
Demonstrated leadership and mentoring capabilities across multiple senior/staff roles with emphasis on software craftsmanship and test-driven development
Rapid technology adoption and proven ability to pick the right tool for the problem, with hands-on experience in high-performance and real-time systems
concerns: Significant gap in recent C++ experience (last professional C++ work was 2014-2015, over 10 years ago); primary recent focus has been TypeScript/JavaScript web development
No demonstrated background in industrial automation, IoT, automation machinery, or related domains central to the role and company
No evidence of experience with IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards, MQTT protocol, or industrial communication standards (Modbus, IEC 61850, etc.)

key_factors.factor: Industrial Domain and Security Standards Knowledge
